note: 100 Tedim (Zolai) sermon/message topics in 4 thematic phases. Used as a pool for service generation and LLM prompt seeding.

sermons.title: Pasian upna dik
sermons.summary: Upna kiti pen a kimu nailo thute phawkna leh muanna ahi hi.

sermons.title: Kilemna taktak
sermons.summary: Leitunga kilemna hi lo, lungsim sunga Pasian hong piak kilemna thu.

sermons.title: Thu ngetna thahatna
sermons.summary: Minute 5 sung thu ngetna in ni thazong khat a hei zo hi.

sermons.title: Lungdam kohna nuntakna
sermons.summary: Bangbang piang zong zingsang thalawhna ah lungdam koh ding.

sermons.title: Kha limlimna
sermons.summary: Lungsim thakhat-a a omna pen Kha Siangtho mapanna ahi hi.

sermons.title: Laisang Siangtho simna
sermons.summary: Ni tampi an ngawlh zong Pasian kammal tawh nuntak ding.

sermons.title: Kha lam gahte
sermons.summary: I lungsim sungah lungduatna, migitna, leh thumanna a gah maw?

sermons.title: Topa phtatna ding hun
sermons.summary: Na haksatna lianpi lakah zong Topa phat in.

sermons.title: Hehpihna lian
sermons.summary: I tualniamna lakah Pasian hehpihna in hong lenkip hi.

sermons.title: A thupi masa tading
sermons.summary: Pasian gam leh a dikna zong masa in, adang khempeuh kibeap ding hi.

sermons.title: Gualzawhna taktak
sermons.summary: Kidona pan hi lo, lungsim zo tana gualzawhna thu.

sermons.title: Hehpih siamna
sermons.summary: Midangte lakah ngaihdamna piak siamna pen Khristian nuntakna hi.

sermons.title: Kha Siangtho makaihna
sermons.summary: I kalsuan khempeuh ah Amah zui ding.

sermons.title: Lametnahom nuntakna
sermons.summary: Jesu sungah mailam ading lametnahom a tangwn kik ding.

sermons.title: Thumanna thupi zia
sermons.summary: Thuman tading kalsuanna in tawpna ah gualzawhna piak ding.

sermons.title: Pasian ngak zongna
sermons.summary: Pasian hun ngak zawhna in nuntakna tampi lungmuang sak hi.

sermons.title: Kha lam hiamte
sermons.summary: Upna phaw, thuman taikhawh tawh satan dou ding.

sermons.title: A thukzaw nuntakna
sermons.summary: Letmat nuntakna lakah pan Kha lam thu thukpi zon ding.

sermons.title: Topa itna thu
sermons.summary: Mi khempeuh hong nusia zong Khrist itna in hong nusia ngei lo hi.

sermons.title: Lungsim hiamna
sermons.summary: Lungsim bup tawh Topa muang in, na pilna zang ken.

sermons.title: Siangthona lam pi
sermons.summary: Khrist tawh kinaihna pen siangthona lampi ah kalsuanna hi.

sermons.title: Nong nuntakna thak
sermons.summary: Nuai a nuntakna lui khempeuh a mangta, nuntakna thak a piang ahi hi.

sermons.title: Pasian kamciamte
sermons.summary: Pasian pen khial ngeilo ahih manin A kamciam a tangtung ding hi.

sermons.title: Thului dik zuihna
sermons.summary: Pasian dotna tawh kalsuan tading thuzuihna.

sermons.title: Tawntung nuntakna
sermons.summary: Leitunga i nuntakna pen tate bang ahi hi, tawntung nuntakna thupi zaw hi.

sermons.title: Innkuan kilemna
sermons.summary: Innkuan sungah Khrist itna tawh kilemna a om masat ding thupi hi.

sermons.title: Nu leh pa zahtakna
sermons.summary: Thukham masa ahi zahtakna in nuntakna hong sawt sak ding hi.

sermons.title: Tate tawn ding lampi
sermons.summary: Tate pen Pasian a pahtat siam dinga makaih ding ahi hi.

sermons.title: Nupa kal itna
sermons.summary: Nupa kal pen Khrist leh Pawlpi kizopna banga a thuk ding hi.

sermons.title: Sanggam kigawmna
sermons.summary: Sanggamte kigawm khawmna pen Topa deihna thupi khat hi.

sermons.title: Innteek siamna
sermons.summary: Zin le tate ngaihsut siamna in thupha tampi hong tun hi.

sermons.title: Hehpih takin thugen siamna
sermons.summary: I kammal zong tate leh tualniamte ading thapiakna hiding.

sermons.title: Pawlpi sung nuntakna
sermons.summary: Pawlpi pen Pumpi khat bang ahih manin khat le khat kigawm ding.

sermons.title: Inndongta hihna
sermons.summary: Midangte haksatna lakah kithuahpih siamna.

sermons.title: Khangnotek leh Upna
sermons.summary: Khangnotek in upna zung khauh tak a thak ding thupi zia.

sermons.title: Lawmpha zopna
sermons.summary: Lawmpha in pha lam ah hong luan pui a, lawm siat in nuntakna siat sak hi.

sermons.title: Tengkhawm phatna
sermons.summary: Pawlpi leh khua sung khantawn ding tengkhawmna.

sermons.title: Mi khempeuh zahtakna
sermons.summary: Mi neu mi lian hi in, mi khempeuh zahtak siamna.

sermons.title: Sum leh Paai zannung
sermons.summary: Pasian piak nuntakna ah sum leh paai dik takin zanning ding.

sermons.title: Angtang nuntakna phelna
sermons.summary: Angtangna in siatna lampi hi a, nuntakna niamna in thupi hi.

sermons.title: Thunget khawmna thahatna
sermons.summary: Innkuan thunget khawmna in upna khang sak hi.

sermons.title: Kilemna zat zia
sermons.summary: Thutuak lohnate lakah kilemna lampi zon siamna.

sermons.title: Ngaihdamna a mau zia
sermons.summary: Midang ngaihdamna piakna in na lungsim suakta sak hi.

sermons.title: Gam tat zia siangtho
sermons.summary: Khristian khat hihna tawh mipi lakah gamtat zia siangtho ding.

sermons.title: Khualzin mite huhna
sermons.summary: Haksatna tuak khualzin mite panpihna thu.

sermons.title: Nasepna leh upna
sermons.summary: I nasepna khempeuh zong Pasian minthang nading hiding hi.

sermons.title: Pilna zon zia dik
sermons.summary: Leitung pilna bek hi lo, Pasian a kihtaakna pen pilna bulpi hi.

sermons.title: Kipumkhatna
sermons.summary: Khua leh tui khantawn nading kipumkhatna thupi zia.

sermons.title: Nuntakna i lhiam zia
sermons.summary: Leitung nuntakna pen tomno ahih manin midang thupha hiding.

sermons.title: Nu leh pa mawhpuakna
sermons.summary: Pasian piak naupangte tading nu leh pa in Kha lam makai hih ding.

sermons.title: Hangsanna taktak
sermons.summary: Kihtaakna om hangin Pasian muang tana kalsuan zawhna.

sermons.title: Lung-ngaihna phitna
sermons.summary: Na lung-ngaihna khempeuh Topa tungah khing in.

sermons.title: Lungkim siamna
sermons.summary: Na neih sunsun tawh lungkim siamna pen hauhna lianpi hi.

sermons.title: Sia leh Pha khen siamna
sermons.summary: Kha Siangtho huhna tawh sia leh pha khen siamna.

sermons.title: Tualniam nuntakna
sermons.summary: Khrist in Ama nuntakna tualniam sak a, eite zong zui ding hi pi.

sermons.title: Kha lam banna
sermons.summary: Ni simin Kha lam ah khangto ding leh ban ding thupi hi.

sermons.title: Lungduatna a zung
sermons.summary: Lungduat zawhna in thupi tampi hong pian sak hi.

sermons.title: Kidawm siamna
sermons.summary: Lungsim heh hun lakah kam gina hetlo gendekna pan kidawm ding.

sermons.title: Nuntak thak kalsuanna
sermons.summary: Kha lam thakhat-a omna leh nuntakna thak zat zia.

sermons.title: Nopna taktak zon zia
sermons.summary: Nopna pen vaang leh sum lakah om lo, Khrist sung bekah om hi.

sermons.title: Kalsuan thakna
sermons.summary: Khialhna pan nung kik a, Pasian lam manman kalsuan kikna.

sermons.title: Pasian nasep thupi
sermons.summary: Neu hi lian hi, Pasian ading nasep khempeuh a lian veve ahi hi.

sermons.title: Upna lakah kizolna
sermons.summary: Upna phawk nading kitolhna thu.

sermons.title: Leitung thute phitna
sermons.summary: Leitung hauhna leh minthangna pen thupit khumna pan a maang ding hi.

sermons.title: Lung-neuna lakah thapiakna
sermons.summary: Na zongthawn hun lakah Pasian kammal tawh thazong in.

sermons.title: Kha lam gimnampha
sermons.summary: I nuntakna pan Khrist gimnampha a pusuak ding hi.

sermons.title: Cihtehtna leh Kalsuanna
sermons.summary: Khristian nuntakna pen tai kidemna bang hi a, zom ding hi.

sermons.title: Pasian ma ah hihna
sermons.summary: Midangte muhna hi lo, Pasian ma ah i hihna taktak thupi zaw hi.

sermons.title: Zuau thute taih phelna
sermons.summary: Thu tak tawh nuntakna in zautatna khempeuh nial ta hi.

sermons.title: Cidamna leh upna
sermons.summary: Pumpi cidamna leh Kha cidamna a kizopna thute.

sermons.title: Khasiatna pan tatkhiatna
sermons.summary: Lungkia mawk ken, Topa in na aw hong za hi.

sermons.title: A thupi zaw nasep
sermons.summary: Lungsim zun nading ni simin hun thupi piak ding.

sermons.title: Pasian kihtaakna
sermons.summary: Pasian kihtaakna in siatna pan hong kem ding hi.

sermons.title: Khuamial lakah Khuavak
sermons.summary: Hih mialna leitunga khuavak banga i tan ding thupi hi.

sermons.title: Topa tawh khualzin khawmna
sermons.summary: Nuntakna pen Pasian tawh khualzin khawmna hi.

sermons.title: Thupha diktak
sermons.summary: Thupha kiti pen hauhna bek hi lo, lungsim bup suahtakna hi.

sermons.title: Vantung gam thupi zia
sermons.summary: Hih leitung nusia-a i tun ding vantung gam ngaihsutna.

sermons.title: Jesu hong pai kik nading
sermons.summary: Amah hong pai kik ding hi, gige mawk loin kiging sa-in om ding.

sermons.title: Nuntakna khantawnna
sermons.summary: Jesu sungah nuntak khantawnna om hi.

sermons.title: Lungsim kihongsa
sermons.summary: Pasian thu ngai ding leh lak ding lungsim kihong neih ding.

sermons.title: Siatna dou zawhna
sermons.summary: Siatna pen phatna tawh zo zaw in.

sermons.title: Kamciam thuman Pasian
sermons.summary: Pasian in I nuntakna ah thuman takin mapang hi.

sermons.title: Thumaan tading gualzawhna
sermons.summary: Mi khempeuh in hong nial zong thuman lam ah ding in.

sermons.title: Nuntakna phatna
sermons.summary: I nuntakna ni sim in Pasian phatna pawi bang hita hen.

sermons.title: Satan dona lampi
sermons.summary: Upna leh thungetna tawh satan zolna khempeuh zawh ding.

sermons.title: Thuciangpi zuihna
sermons.summary: Khrist piak thuciam lianpi tate bawl nasepna.

sermons.title: Khrist-a Kipumkhatna
sermons.summary: Khrist sungah pum khat i hihna phawk ding.

sermons.title: Mawh ngaihdamna thupha
sermons.summary: Mawh phelna pan a piang suakta nuntakna.

sermons.title: Nuntakna luikhuk
sermons.summary: Pasian pan a pusuak nuntakna tui nung tawn ding.

sermons.title: Khristian tangkona
sermons.summary: I gamtatna tawh tate leh mite tungah Jesu tangko ding.

sermons.title: Lung-neu mawk lohna
sermons.summary: Topa sungah na nasepna a thawn hi ngei lo hi.

sermons.title: Pasian itna lian
sermons.summary: Mi hingte itna khempeuh sang a lian zaw Pasian itna.

sermons.title: Upna lakah taizawhna
sermons.summary: Thazong lakah zong upna galkap bang taizawh ding.

sermons.title: Lungsim siatna khempeuh phelna
sermons.title_en: Healing Every Wound of the Heart
sermons.summary: Huatna, hazaatna lungsim pan suahtak nading.

sermons.title: Topa lungdamna
sermons.summary: Topa sung lungdamna pen i thahatna ahi hi.

sermons.title: Nuntakna lampi man
sermons.summary: Leitung lampi tampi lakah Khrist bek lampi taktak hi.

sermons.title: Pasian ading mipi
sermons.summary: Eite pen Ama a hidinga it takin a gual mipi i hi hi.

sermons.title: Khuavak hihna
sermons.summary: Mialna lakah khuavak banga i tan ding thupi zia.

sermons.title: A tawpna gualzawhna
sermons.summary: Leitung haksatna khempeuh zawh ciang Khrist tawh luangkhawm ding.

sermons.title: Tawntung Khrist sungah
sermons.summary: I nuntakna bul leh a tawpna pen Khrist bek ahi hi. Amin.
